message:
feat(engine): expand verification CLI, harden epoch invalidation, and add test depth gate + lockstep runner

franken-verify CLI (bin/franken-verify.rs, +182 lines):
- Add --signature-key-hex, --signature-key-file, --receipt-key,
  --receipt-key-file, and --counterfactual-config-file flags to
  replay verification subcommand
- Parse receipt key overrides and counterfactual config from files
- Wire signature verification and counterfactual replay into the
  verification pipeline

epoch_invalidation.rs:
- Add InvalidationError::InvalidState variant with expected/actual
  state descriptions for clearer diagnostics
- Replace AlreadyInFallback errors with InvalidState when
  specialization is in wrong phase for re-specialization or commit
- Use current_epoch instead of activated_epoch for invalidation
  receipt old_epoch field (correctness fix)

expected_loss_selector.rs:
- Replace .abs() with .saturating_abs() in 5 locations to prevent
  i64::MIN overflow panics in borderline sensitivity, regime shift,
  and alien risk classification computations
- Improve borderline decision test assertions

execution_cell.rs:
- Fix budget_consumed_ms to include total accumulated budget from
  all prior execute_effect calls plus the close transition cost,
  not just the static CELL_TRANSITION_BUDGET_MS constant
- Fix region child creation to use cloned child_region instead of
  constructing duplicate

error_code.rs: add ConcurrencyLimitReached to SagaError error code mapping
saga_orchestrator.rs: improvements to saga orchestration
regret_bounded_router.rs: rustfmt formatting + refinements
fleet_convergence.rs: formatting cleanup
spectral_fleet_convergence.rs: minor adjustments
region_lifecycle.rs: minor fix
lib.rs: register new modules

New modules:
- test_depth_gate.rs (+1710 lines): depth-aware test gating system
  for controlling test execution based on verification depth levels
- bin/franken_lockstep_runner.rs: lockstep execution runner binary

test_taxonomy.rs (+933 lines): major expansion with rustfmt cleanup,
  improved fixture registry, ownership map, and contract validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
